name: Julia Set Fractal
description: Frattale di Julia con palette colori arcobaleno
splitCode: function(params, numPeers) { const stripHeight = Math.ceil(params.height / numPeers); const tasks = []; for (let i = 0; i < numPeers; i++) { const yStart = i * stripHeight; const yEnd = Math.min(yStart + stripHeight, params.height); tasks.push({ id: `julia_${i}`, yStart, yEnd, width: params.width, height: params.height, maxIter: params.param }); } return tasks; }
computeCode: function(task) { const { yStart, yEnd, width, height, maxIter } = task; const stripHeight = yEnd - yStart; const imageData = new Uint8ClampedArray(width * stripHeight * 4); const cReal = -0.7; const cImag = 0.27015; const zoom = 1.5; for (let py = 0; py < stripHeight; py++) { const y = yStart + py; for (let px = 0; px < width; px++) { let zx = (px - width / 2) / (0.5 * zoom * width); let zy = (y - height / 2) / (0.5 * zoom * height); let iter = 0; while (zx * zx + zy * zy < 4 && iter < maxIter) { const tmp = zx * zx - zy * zy + cReal; zy = 2 * zx * zy + cImag; zx = tmp; iter++; } const idx = (py * width + px) * 4; if (iter === maxIter) { imageData[idx] = 0; imageData[idx + 1] = 0; imageData[idx + 2] = 0; } else { const t = iter / maxIter; const r = Math.floor(9 * (1 - t) * t * t * t * 255); const g = Math.floor(15 * (1 - t) * (1 - t) * t * t * 255); const b = Math.floor(8.5 * (1 - t) * (1 - t) * (1 - t) * t * 255); imageData[idx] = r; imageData[idx + 1] = g; imageData[idx + 2] = b; } imageData[idx + 3] = 255; } } return { imageData: Array.from(imageData), yStart, yEnd }; }
mergeCode: function(results, params) { const canvas = document.createElement('canvas'); canvas.width = params.width; canvas.height = params.height; const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d'); results.sort((a, b) => a.yStart - b.yStart); for (const result of results) { const stripHeight = result.yEnd - result.yStart; const imageData = ctx.createImageData(params.width, stripHeight); imageData.data.set(new Uint8ClampedArray(result.imageData)); ctx.putImageData(imageData, 0, result.yStart); } return canvas.toDataURL(); }
